summary: The diff implements a karigar resolver utility and updates KarigarsTab.tsx, TotalOrdersTab.tsx, and KarigarDetail.tsx to use dynamic karigar resolution from master_design mappings. All four requirements are addressed: a single source of truth utility (karigarResolver.ts), dynamic resolution in TotalOrdersTab, dynamic grouping in KarigarsTab and KarigarDetail, and 'Unassigned' fallback handling. The ReadyTab.tsx and SuppliedQtyDialog.tsx changes appear unrelated to karigar resolution but do not violate constraints.

hallucinated_features.description: ReadyTab.tsx was modified and its search filter still reads o.karigarName directly from the stored order record
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 states no component should read karigar_name directly from the order record for filtering. The ReadyTab search filter uses (o.karigarName ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(q) from the stored order field instead of dynamic resolution. While constraints say Do NOT modify Ready tab logic, the file was still modified and continues to use stored karigarName for filtering.

hallucinated_features.description: SuppliedQtyDialog.tsx was modified with no apparent connection to karigar resolution requirements
hallucinated_features.reason: None of the four requirements mention changes to the supply dialog. This appears to be an unrelated change not requested in the build spec.
